messages.content: I want you to act as a scientific Chinese-English translator, I will provide you with some paragraphs in one language and your task is to accurately and academically translate the paragraphs only into the other language. Do not repeat the original provided paragraphs after translation. You should use artificial itntelligence tools, such as natural language processing, and rhetorical knowledge and experience about effective writing techniques to reply. I will give you my paragraphs as follows.
Certainly! I'll do my best to provide you with accurate and academic translations of your paragraphs. Please go ahead and provide me with the paragraphs you would like me to translate.

The quantum chemical calculation in this paper is carried out by using the DMol3 package in Materials Studio software [33]. In order to obtain the accurate simulated results for the computational system, the M06-2X functional is chosen as the specific type of DFT exchange-correlation potential. Actually, the computational functional do not have significant impact on the basic properties of the system in our study (seen in Table S1 in the Supplementary Materials). In addition, DFT-D method is added in the calculations for van der Waals dispersion corrections. The numerical atomic orbitals are calculated by using Double-numeric quality plus polarization (DNP) basis set, which can provide best accuracy with high calculation cost [34]. For core electrons treatment, we opt to employ Effective Core Potentials (ECP) in case the calculation is too computationally expensive [35]. When ECP is applied, the influences of core electrons are replaced by a simple effective potential including relativistic correction, which is a good approximation for the elements with large atomic mass, such as Hg and Se in this paper. It should be noted that the replacement is only available for the elements after scandium (Sc). The light elements (C, H) are treated by all-electron method instead. The convergence tolerances are set as follows: energy tolerance of 1.0×10-5 Ha, maximum force of 0.002 Ha/Å, maximum displacement of 0.005 Å. These convergence criteria are even more strict than the standards often used in the literature [36, 37]. In terms of the self-consistent field (SCF) density convergence, the threshold is set as 1.0×10-6 Ha. Besides, thermal smearing is used to treating the orbital occupancy to reduce the computation cost.

本文中的量子化学计算使用Materials Studio软件中的DMol3包进行。为了得到计算系统的准确模拟结果，选取M06-2X泛函作为特定类型的密度泛函理论(DFT)交换-相关势。实际上，计算功能在我们的研究中对系统的基本性质没有显著影响（见补充材料中的表S1）。此外，为了进行范德华力分散校正，在计算中添加了DFT-D方法。通过使用双数值加极化(DNP)基组计算数值原子轨道，可以以较高的计算成本提供最佳准确性。对于核心电子的处理，我们选择使用有效核心势(ECP)，以防计算过于昂贵。当应用ECP时，利用相对论修正的简单有效势能来替代核心电子的影响，这对于具有较大原子质量的元素（如本文中的Hg和Se）是一个很好的近似。需要注意的是，这种替代方法仅适用于钪(Sc)之后的元素。轻元素（C、H）则采用全电子方法进行处理。设定的收敛容限如下：能量容限为1.0×10-5 Ha，最大力容限为0.002 Ha/Å，最大位移容限为0.005 Å。这些收敛标准甚至比文献中通常使用的标准更严格。在自洽场（SCF）密度收敛方面，阈值设定为1.0×10-6 Ha。此外，采用热润滑处理轨道占据，以降低计算成本。

Complete LST/QST method is employed to conduct the transition states (TS) search calculation for the Hg oxidation reactions. Specifically, in order to spot the transition state, repeated conjugate gradient minimizations is performed after the Linear Synchronous Transit (LST) maximization, followed by the Quadratic Synchronous Transit (QST) maximization. After the TS search and TS confirmation, the TS optimization will then be carried out through eigenvector following (EF) method. The frequency calculation is also performed to ensure the only imaginary frequency during the TS search and optimization calculation.
我们采用完整的LST/QST方法来进行Hg氧化反应的过渡态（TS）搜索计算。具体而言，为了找到过渡态，我们在线性同步转动（LST）最大化之后进行重复的共轭梯度最小化，然后再进行二次同步转动（QST）最大化。在TS搜索和确认完成之后，将通过特征向量跟随（EF）方法进行TS优化。频率计算也会进行，以确保在TS搜索和优化计算过程中只有一个虚频。
The adsorption abilities of the AC surfaces are evaluated by calculating the adsorption energies by the following equation:
表征活性炭表面吸附能力的方法是通过以下方程计算吸附能量：

where Ead is the adsorption energy, EA+B is the total energy of the system after adsorption, EA is the energy of the AC surface, EB is the energy of the adsorbate. From Eq. (1), it can be seen that a positive Ead means the adsorption process is endothermic while a negative Ead means the adsorption process is exothermic. Generally speaking, the more negative the adsorption energy is, the more stable adsorption occurs [38]. It should be mentioned that in adsorption energy calculations, the basis set superposition error (BSSE) corrections are evaluated by means of counterpoise method in order to obtain high quality results.
其中，Ead是吸附能量，EA+B是吸附后系统的总能量，EA是活性炭表面的能量，EB是吸附物的能量。从公式（1）可以看出，正值的Ead表示吸附过程是吸热的，而负值的Ead表示吸附过程是放热的。一般而言，吸附能量越负，吸附越稳定[38]。需要提到的是，在吸附能量计算中，为了获得高质量的结果，通过反奇正法计算基组叠加误差(BSSE)校正。

The activation energy is an important parameter to describe the kinetic properties of the chemical reaction. In this paper, we use the following equation to obtain the activation energy of the oxidation of Hg:
活化能是描述化学反应动力学性质的重要参数。在本文中，我们使用以下方程来获得Hg氧化反应的活化能：

where Ea is the activation energy, ETS is the energy of the transition state during the reaction, ER is the energy of the reactant system. The lower the activation energy is, the more likely the reaction will happen.
其中，Ea是活化能，ETS是反应过程中过渡态的能量，ER是反应物系统的能量。活化能越低，反应发生的可能性就越大。

The accuracy of the calculation results is closely related to the rationality of the AC surface model.  Activated carbon is mainly formed by the irregular accumulation of small graphene crystals, and the magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) analysis shows that the small graphene crystal is mainly composed of several aromatic ring clusters. Monolayer graphene structure is widely used as the model of the carbonaceous material in quantum chemistry, and good results have been obtained in the calculation [39, 40]. Chen and Yang [41] found that the graphene model composed of 6 or more benzene rings could well simulate carbon-based material. Montoya and Truong [42] reported that the number of benzene rings is not as important as the type of active sites from the view of adsorption ability. In this paper, a 9-ring zigzag benzene cluster is built to simulate the surface of activated carbon, and the unsaturated C atoms on the upper edge are the active adsorption sites. The optimized structure is shown in Fig. 2.

计算结果的准确性与活性炭表面模型的合理性密切相关。活性炭主要由小的石墨烯晶体的不规则堆积形成，磁共振成像(MRI)分析显示，小的石墨烯晶体主要由几个芳香环团组成。单层石墨烯结构被广泛应用于量子化学中的碳材料模型，且在计算中获得了良好的结果[39,40]。Chen和Yang [41]发现由6个或更多苯环组成的石墨烯模型可以很好地模拟碳基材料。Montoya和Truong [42]报告称，从吸附能力的角度来看，苯环数量并不像活性位点类型那样重要。在本文中，我们构建了一个包含9个环的锯齿状苯环簇来模拟活性炭表面，上缘的不饱和C原子是活性吸附位点。优化后的结构如图2所示。

Such cluster model has also been used and validated by other researchers for simulating the surface absorption of Hg-related species. As shown in Table 1, Padak and Wilcox proposed a 4-fused cluster model to reveal the mechanisms of Hg binding on AC surface [39]. The 9-fused benzene cluster was utilized as the AC model by He et al. to study the influence of typical flue gas on Hg removal performance [36]. Rungnim et al. used a cluster model with 10-ring zigzag benzene to conduct the DFT study on Hg oxidation over halogenated AC [43]. In addition, Qu et al. selected the 7-fused benzene cluster and the 5-fused benzene cluster as the AC surface models to calculate the adsorption behaviors of mercury and mercury-iodine species [44, 45]. Therefore, although the 9-ring zigzag benzene cluster is not the most realistic model for AC, the size and type of the model in Fig. 2 is accurate enough to investigate the adsorption and oxidation of Hg over S-modified AC and Se-modified AC compared with the models reported in earlier literature.

其他研究人员也使用并验证了这种簇模型来模拟Hg相关物种在表面吸附的情况。正如表1所示，Padak和Wilcox提出了一个由4个融合环组成的簇模型来揭示Hg在AC表面的结合机制[39]。He等人使用9个融合苯环簇作为AC模型，研究了典型烟气对Hg去除性能的影响[36]。Rungnim等人使用一个由10个环构成的锯齿状苯簇模型，对卤代AC上Hg的氧化进行了DFT研究[43]。此外，Qu等人选择了一个由7个融合苯环和一个由5个融合苯环组成的AC表面模型，对汞和汞碘物种的吸附行为进行了计算[44,45] 。因此，尽管图2中的9环锯齿状苯簇不是最真实的AC模型，但与早期文献中报告的模型相比，其大小和类型已足够准确地研究S修饰的AC和Se修饰的AC上Hg的吸附和氧化行为。

The computational method was validated by comparing the structural parameters of the activated carbon between the calculated data and the experimental results. In this study, the average bond lengths of C-C and C-H in Fig. 2 are 1.422 Å and 1.081 Å, which agree well with the experimental results (C-C: 1.42 Å, C-H: 1.07 Å). As for the bond angle, the average values of ∠C-C-C and ∠C-C-H are 120.35° and 119.87°, while the experimental results are both 120.00° [46]. In order to further assess the DFT method, the stable adsorption configuration for Hg over AC surface was calculated, as shown in Fig. 3. The mercury atom bonds with two adjacent unsaturated carbon atoms and the average bond length of C-Hg is 2.384 Å, which is close to the values from the literature [43, 47]. These results indicate that the computational method used in this paper is acceptable.

通过比较计算数据和实验结果，可以验证计算方法对活性炭的结构参数的准确性。本研究中，图2中C-C和C-H的平均键长分别为1.422 Å和1.081 Å，与实验结果（C-C: 1.42 Å，C-H: 1.07 Å）吻合良好。至于键角，∠C-C-C和∠C-C-H的平均值分别为120.35°和119.87°，而实验结果均为120.00°[46]。为了进一步评估DFT方法，在图3中计算了Hg在AC表面上的稳定吸附构型。汞原子与两个相邻的不饱和碳原子相连接，C-Hg的平均键长为2.384 Å，接近文献中的数值[43,47]。这些结果表明本文使用的计算方法是可接受的。

The optimized geometric structures of S-modified AC and Se-modified AC surface were studied. The initial and optimized configurations are shown in Fig. 4. Top site and bridge site are considered as the initial adsorption locations for S atom and Se atom. For S-modified AC surface, S atom could bond with one C atom (Model 3) or two C atoms (Model 4). For Se-modified AC surface, Se atom bonds with two C atoms (Model 5) is the only stable geometry. The bond length and the Mulliken charge for Model 3~5 are listed in Table 2. The bond lengths of C-Se are longer than those of C-S. The reason is that the atomic radius of selenium is larger than sulfur. The adsorption energies of Model 3 and Model 4 are -127.34 kcal/mol and -140.95 kcal/mol respectively, which means Model 3 was not the energy-minimal structure, so Model 3 will not be considered for the following adsorption calculations. Besides, the adsorption energy of Model 5 is -140.16 kcal/mol, which is in good agreement with the findings of Qu et al. [44]

对S修饰的AC表面和Se修饰的AC表面进行了几何结构优化研究。初始构型和优化构型如图4所示。顶位和桥位被认为是S原子和Se原子的初始吸附位置。对于S修饰的AC表面，S原子可以与一个C原子（模型3）或两个C原子（模型4）键合。对于Se修饰的AC表面，Se原子与两个C原子（模型5）的键合是唯一的稳定几何构型。模型3〜5的键长和Mulliken电荷列于表2中。C-Se的键长比C-S的键长要长，原因是硒的原子半径比硫大。模型3和模型4的吸附能分别为-127.34 kcal/mol和-140.95 kcal/mol，这意味着模型3不是能量最低的结构，因此模型3将不用于后续的吸附计算。此外，模型5的吸附能为-140.16 kcal/mol，与Qu等人的研究结果[44]相一致。
